title: Double click on event results is JS error regarding invalid time format - possible TZ issue
core.Util: typeOf() => support for null values
calendar.view.week.Component: updateEvents() => do not render events which end before the min axis start time
calendar.view.week.Component: updateEvents() => do not render events which start after the max axis end time
component.Clock: change the default time value to '00:00'
